statement: Breast Cancer Burden: Global Trends and Insights from Asia. 63.4% of breast cancer cases are diagnosed at stages I to II in Asia, often occurring at a younger age, which underscores the need for consistent long-term follow-up.

statement: Current Gaps in Modern Breast Cancer Treatment. Precise Localization
Current Gaps in Modern Breast Cancer Treatment. Surgical Localization post NAC
Accurate Localization. Ensures precise marking of biopsy sites to aid future imaging, interventions and biopsies.
Optimizes Imaging & Localization. Optimizes Imaging & Localization
Improves Surgical Precision. Increases the chances of achieving clear lesion margins (90% with markers vs. 31–62% without).
Supports Pathology & Treatment. Facilitates multifocal tumour assessment and accurate tissue sampling.

Annals of the National Academy of Medical Sciences (India). 2022;58(02):069-077 2.3 million new breast cancer cases were diagnosed globally in 2022, with 42.9% of them in Asia.1 Breast Cancer Burden: Global Trends and Insights from Asia 63.4% of breast cancer cases are diagnosed at stages I to II in Asia, often occurring at a younger age, which underscores the need for consistent long-term follow-up.2,3 Recent Trends in Breast Cancer Management Neoadjuvant Chemotherapy (NAC) Downsize tumors Assess treatment response in real-time Improve surgical precision NAC, administered before surgery to shrink tumors, has become a key approach in the management of locally advanced breast cancer.4 Increasingly, NAC is also used in early-stage breast cancer to:5 Advances in Imaging MRI and multimodal imaging are particularly beneﬁcial in detecting microlesions.4 Second-look ultrasound and MRI-guided biopsies further improve detection.4 The Role of Breast Tissue Markers in Modern Oncology Improves Surgical Precision Increases the chances of achieving clear lesion margins (90% with markers vs. 31–62% without).6 Optimizes Imaging & Localization6 Supports Pathology & Treatment Facilitates multifocal tumour assessment and accurate tissue sampling.6 Accurate Localization Ensures precise marking of biopsy sites to aid future imaging, interventions and biopsies.6,7 Guideline Recommendations for Breast Tissue Markers Oncology societies recommend placing a tissue marker (clip) during biopsy of suspicious nodes and breast lesions to accurately guide future surgery, radiation planning, and treatment.
